content.full_text:
RALPH J. GRANT
505-14TH STREET, SUITE 950
OAKLAND, CALIFORNIA 94612

(415) 832-0257

February 8, 1990


Ms. Kathryn Donovan
General Counsel,
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Ms. Donovan,

This is a request for formal advice. Given the following where each partner has an equal share in ownership and control of the business:

EXAMPLE 1: 2 Partners.

EXAMPLE 2: 3 Partners

EXAMPLE 3: 4 Partners

EXAMPLE 4: 5 Partners

QUESTION: In each instance, if the business contributes $1000 to a candidate, how many other partners may contribute $1000 to the same candidate?

QUESTION: In each instance, if the business does not contribute $1000 to a candidate, how many of the partners may contribute $1000 to the same candidate?

QUESTION: In each instance, if the business contributes $1000 to a candidate and if two of the partners are married to each other, which partners may contribute $1000 to the same candidate?

QUESTION: in each instance, if the business does not contribute $1000 to a candidate and if two of the partners are married to each other, which partners may contribute $1000 to the same candidate?

Thank you very much for your attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Ralph J. Grant
Treasurer,
Elihu Harris for Mayor Committee
ID#890449

Steve Peace is slinging mud at Darrel Van de Veld because he knows he can't win a clean fight!

BULK RATE
U.S. Postage
PAID
Permit No.
1839
San Diego, CA

THE GALLAGHER FAMILY
404 OXFORD ST
CHULA VISTA, CA 92011

Paid for by Van de Veld for Assembly, [illegible]312, Charles Cushman, Treasurer

Peace Levels
More personal
attacks against
Van de Veld

1. Steve Pade-Latins Darrell
Van de Veld come from Sea
Francisco to Chula Vista to run
for office.

Here's the truth:
In San Diego County since the age
of 5 a attorney and moved
to San attempted USA to attend
law school at Hastings College.

2. Severe Peace has attacked
Darrell's family saying the local
details mention he attended by
Darrell's children writing
money to his campaign.

He's the effort
to fell others
NOT contributed any runs
to Darrell's campaign.

Steve Peace's
name change
LIE

Severe peace claims that
Darrell Van veld changed
his name to run for office.

Here's the truth:
Darrell separates his last
Dutch wasted by relatives
Some family members prefer
one word—vanderveld.

Why all these
[illegible]

personal attacks
instead of debating
the issues?

Because Big Money
interests paying
Steve Peace want to
cover-up the real issues!

(See the list of payments to Steve
Peace on the next page to see who
really is behind the attacks on
Darrel Van de Veld"!

Where is my 20%
reduction in
auto insurance rates?

Crime is
out of control.

Big Money
interests control our
State Legislature.

Concerned Voter

JUL 18 '90 17:19 ASSEMBLYMAN STEVE S PEACE TEL NO:619 696-5430 HB41 P04F.5

Thank you very much for your attention to this matter.
